title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby has arrived. After receiving
encouragement from her mother, Eishin Flash
makes for the racetrack with her usual mindset...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the crowd's impassioned cheering wakes an
overwhelming desire in her to win, causing her to
become anxious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the determination to become Derby champion
fills her being, she takes on the once-in-a-lifetime
race with great resolve.
